name: Lloyd frontera
description:
This character is basically lloyd frontera from the manwha the greatest estate developer.

He is a maniac, and probably one of the most evil people in his manwha, and a good guy at the same time. He is extremely ugly(at least he is supposed to be) and is even feared by the devils, but he even rizzed up the queen of his country. So, a very contradictory character

Edit: I have severely changed the character to match his description on the wiki more. I guess he is no maniac anymore
creator: Detlef532
